74548.subject: 📈 Markets surge on back of US/Iran peace deal
74548.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $66,150 (2.4%) | **ETH** $1,762 (5.2%) | **SOL** $73 (6.3%)

* US/Iran [peace deal](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2066287098806604185?s=20) to be signed on Friday — European countries prepare to [lift sanctions on Iran](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2066301021580615929?s=20) following peace deal with US — Peace deal [details](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2066285395365470617?s=20) include a 60 day negotiation period

* Bitcoin [reclaims $66K](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/bitcoin/) and US equities markets gain [1-2% in premarket](https://www.cnn.com/markets/premarkets) on the back of peace in Iran

* The Nikkei gains 5.4% and hits a [new ATH](https://x.com/tokens/status/2066475907418845642?s=20)

* [Zcash pumps 20%](https://x.com/Tyler_Did_It/status/2066476913686692178?s=20) overnight reclaiming $500 — Worldcoin [gains 24%](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/worldcoin-org/)

* 11 [leveraged SpaceX ETFs](https://x.com/EricBalchunas/status/2066480318354206921?s=20) are set to go live today — [Options](https://x.com/tokens/status/2066480940625580094?s=20) on SPCX go live today — Elon predicts [$1T revenue](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2066298142597730723?s=20) by 2030

* The White House hosts a [UFC event](https://x.com/WhiteHouse/status/2066334785060888654?s=20)

* BTC and ETH ETFs have [5th straight week](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066369000356061217?s=20) of net outflows

* Kevin Warsh will chair his [first FOMC](https://x.com/NotSoEasyMoney/status/2066327837708050506?s=20) this Wednesday

* [Fox acquires Roku](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2066477199843041469?s=20) for $160 per share cash and stock deal

* [Polymarket flips Hyperliquid](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2066313469117317428?s=20) in 24 hour revenue

* 75% of crypto companies may [lose their license](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066356380236382463?s=20) when MiCA transition ends on July 1st

* Japan advances bill to reclassify [crypto & cut tax](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2064995214876348758) to 20%.

* ==Fidelity picks ==[Uniswap](https://x.com/Uniswap/status/2065159152486199396)== as liquidity layer for FIDD stablecoin==

———————————————————————————


———

You are

74547.subject: Asteria Business Update: Zajtraodhalíme aktuálne čísla a smerovanie
74547.body:
Čo hovoria dáta, čo prinesú novinky Wexo a koľko Founders Packov ešte zostáva.

Asteria Business Update 5/2026

📅 Utorok 16. 6. | ⏰ 20:00 | 💻 Online

Exkluzívny biznis briefing s obchodným riaditeľom Asteria

Juraj Farkaš vám otvorí dvere do sveta čísel, stratégie a príležitostí, ktoré práve teraz formujú budúcnosť Asteria. Žiadna teória – konkrétne čísla, jasné stratégie a reálne príležitosti, ktoré môžete využiť okamžite.

🎯 ČO VÁS ČAKÁ

🚀 Nová kariéra – kompletný pohľad na kariérny plán a ako z neho vyťažiť maximum
	📊 Pohľad na čísla – čo hovoria dáta a kam smerujeme
	💎 Čo znamenajú novinky Wexo pre váš biznis – ako premeniť produktové updaty na reálny príjem
	⏳ Founders Packy – koľko ich ešte zostáva? – posledná šanca byť pri tom od začiatku 

💡 PREČO TAM MUSÍTE BYŤ?

Toto nie je obyčajný webinár. Je to strategické stretnutie pre tých, ktorí to s biznisom myslia vážne. Dozviete sa informácie, ktoré vám poskytnú konkurenčnú výhodu a ukážu, ako maximalizovať svoj potenciál v Asteria práve teraz – kým je trh otvorený a príležitosti čerstvé.

Founders Packy sa nebudú predávať večne. Kto zaváha, prehráva.

👉 ZAREGISTRUJTE SA

Tento webinár by ste si nemali nechať ujsť, ak chcete vedieť, kam Asteria smeruje a ako z toho vyťažiť maximum.

Registrovať sa https://event.webinarjam.com/q3vw4/register/m47rvi0w

Tešíme sa na Vás,

Tím Asteria

https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61572533694926

https://www.instagram.com/myasteriagroup/

https://www.youtube.com/@MyAsteriaGroup

https://x.com/myasteriagroup

https://t.me/AsteriaNetwork

Asteria Events

22 Boulevard Plaza Tower 2, Dubai,

74544.subject: Companies are scrambling to curtail soaring AI costs
74544.body:
The Economist’s week ahead

Автор: The Economist


Автор: The Economist

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/companies-scrambling-curtail-soaring-ai-costs-the-economist-xpqhe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BFTVJEdSXTYimjzIxnYVwyg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1o87cQVc6m4ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqf4rxgl~j4-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqf4rxgl-j4
  
Enjoying this newsletter? Get it in your inbox every weekend, as well as our daily round-up of The Economist’s best journalism, by signing up for free here. Until recently bosses encouraged employees to binge on artificial intelligence, with spending seen as a sign of innovation. Employees could even take pride in burning through tokens—the chunks of text that models process and a common unit of AI pricing. Now, though, companies are scrambling to rein in soaring AI bills. Tokenmaxxing is no longer a badge of honour. And we’ve previously covered the Donroe doctrine—or delusion. But what about the Donroe dividend? As it turns out, Latin America has been unusually well placed to benefit from the chaos of Donald Trump’s second term. Roger McShane, Deputy US editor What to expect in the week ahead: ▸ World leaders arrive in the French lakeside town of Evian-les-Bains today for a G7 summit, which runs until Wednesday. The official agenda focuses on global economic imbalances, but discussions will probably be dominated by geopolitics, including war in Ukraine and the Middle East. Barring a last-minute upset, Donald Trump is expected to attend. Much will depend on his attitude—last year he left a G7 get-together in Canada early. ▸ Kevin Warsh will chair his first interest-rate-setting meeting as head of America’s Federal Reserve on Tuesday and Wednesday. Mr Trump wants lower rates, and appointed Mr Warsh in January because he, too, favoured them. But the case for rate cuts has crumbled. Higher oil prices, the result of Mr Trump’s war with Iran, pushed annual inflation to 4.2% in May, a three-year high. ▸ A by-election in Britain on Thursday promises to be the most consequential in years. Andy Burnham, a challenger to Sir Keir Starmer, the prime minister, will return to Westminster if victorious. The current mayor of Greater Manchester would then claim to Labour Party members that his success shows he is the best man to lead them into the next general election. Editor’s picks Illustration: Nick Little Companies are scrambling to curtail soaring AI costs “It’s going to be an absolute nightmare,” says an executive at a big American tech company. He is talking about an emerging problem for businesses that use artificial intelligence. AI agents—bots that can read, interpret and act—use masses of processing power and have started to ru

Fear and Greed is at
24
(Fear).
The market has quietly recovered from the cycle low hit last
week, with BTC climbing back toward
$66K
over the weekend as selling pressure eased.

The macro picture is stabilising. But the news landscape shifted
dramatically over the weekend. The US government pulled
Anthropic's two most advanced AI models with an emergency
directive. SpaceX's tokenized IPO bids collapsed on three
exchanges. And Saylor gave his clearest explanation yet for why
Strategy sold Bitcoin.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

US Orders Anthropic To Pull Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5

The US government issued an emergency export control directive
on June 13 ordering Anthropic to suspend Claude Fable 5 and
Claude Mythos 5 for all foreign nationals on national security
grounds. To comply, Anthropic disabled both models globally.

The models had been released just days earlier. All other
Anthropic models remain accessible.

What capability of Mythos Preview made these models a national
security concern?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/mZew1wb7wET3qB5BSlYrcA~~/AAQRxRA~/jLq8tV5HD1KZBaz0HEeKfFL4BKJDzOfX3s61AbVYKC6IGi_BAaAl5nzGZoKptsGDpjCSkeidMhZD2t8Ev8Fhn0QCSmsmzqU9siGWbI0xm06iM1HHFQ3sbjsMq-hg3oOoaDCyCdRMNTEHc6krlJsrbAMY5xvQPhWwU9ESqoj2Uos~ )
